Off Calendar Jan-23-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Michael R. Boulanger of the law offices of Patenaude & Felix APC (858.244.7600) appears via telephone as counsel for petitioner

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Petitioner Main Street Business Loans, LLC's motion to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
